title: A Simple Timer
description: Adds a simple customizable in-game timer
body:
# A Simple Timer

A lightweight, client-side countdown timer overlay for Minecraft 26.1.2 (Fabric). 

Set a length, hit a key, watch the clock — that's it.

## Features

- **Async countdown** that ticks in real time. The world pausing, lag spikes, or low frame rate don't affect it (unless you opt in via Auto-Pause).
- **Always-on-top HUD** that draws over chat, the hotbar, and the debug overlay. Drag-to-place anywhere on screen.
- **Smart time formatting** that scales with the chosen length:
  - Under 1 hour → `20:00`
  - 1–9 hours → `1:00:00`
  - 10–99 hours → `10:00:00`
  - 100+ hours → `100:00:00`
- **State-aware accent bar** on the left edge of the timer:
  - Green while running
  - Amber while paused
  - Red when expired
- **Bell on expiry** — a soft note-block bell rings once when the timer hits zero, routed through the UI sound channel so it respects your GUI volume slider.
- **Pause-menu integration** — a clock button sits to the left of the Advancements button in the Esc menu and opens the settings screen.

## Keybinds (rebindable in vanilla Controls)

| Action | Default |
|---|---|
| Start / Pause | `=` |
| Reset | `-` |
| Hide / Show | unbound by default|

## Settings

Open via the clock icon in the pause menu.

- **Length** — three numeric fields (hours / minutes / seconds) with a reset-to-default icon to the right.
- **Reposition Timer** — opens a dedicated drag screen with a faint grid, instruction banner and controls in the top-left corner so they never get in the way of where you want to put the timer. The timer always renders on top of the grid for visibility.
- **Visible** — toggle the on-screen overlay.
- **Padding** — adjust the black space around the numbers (2 px to 24 px in 2 px steps).
- **Auto-Pause** — when on, the timer pauses with the game (singleplayer pause menu) and resumes when you unpause.
- **Live controls** — Start/Pause and Reset buttons sit above the settings panel so you can scrub the timer without leaving the menu.

All settings persist to `<config>/simple_timer.json`.

## Requirements

- Minecraft **26.1.x** (built and tested on 26.1.2)
- Fabric Loader **0.19.2+**
- Fabric API **0.148.0+26.1.2** or compatible

## Compatibility

This mod is **client-side only**. It will not load on dedicated servers and does not require server-side cooperation — install it on your client, then feel free to join any vanilla or modded server. It will still work!
